message:
fix(io): narrow unsafe scope in uring and remove unused reactor wake proxy

- src/fs/uring.rs: wrap OwnedFd::from_raw_fd in an inner unsafe block
  with an explicit SAFETY comment, following Rust best practice of
  scoping unsafe to the exact operation rather than relying on the
  enclosing unsafe fn.
- src/runtime/io_driver.rs: remove IoDriverHandle::wake() added in
  413578c6; the cross-thread reactor wake is no longer routed through
  the driver handle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
